历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 43943 → 3976 → 28195 → 25681 → 23042. In 2021, the ranking was lowered to 43943 due to the Malaysia campus. Excluding this anomaly, the trend over the past 4 years is 3976 → 28195 → 25681 → 23042, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking number), with a cumulative backward shift of about 19066 places over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 23042. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 100 in 2021, 69 in 2022, 102 in 2023, 109 in 2024, and 106 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 71, a reduction of about 33% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 25th, stable among the top 25 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier university group. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety, school management, and signals of admission gaps. On Douyin, it ranks 5th in overall popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention for applications. The 2025 abnormal admission signal is low attention, but the reputation document indicates that the school's enrollment has been deteriorating since 2017, with declines in both high and low score segments. It has 14 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, and Statistics, A in Business Administration and Applied Economics, A- in Law and Mathematics, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, not a local university in this province, so there is no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is at a medium level, with no significant regional preference impact. Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics remains high. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025 and 347,000 in 2026, rising year by year, with an increase of about 8.4% from 2025 to 2026, continuously intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction of 33% in the 2026 plan, the increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province, and negative reputation signals, and taking into account the additional competitive pressure from the expanding examinee pool, the ranking is slightly adjusted upward to 18527. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18527, with a range of 18027–19027.
